exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hold from last session (RPE 9). Focus on hip hinge, not lower back.

exercises.name: Pull-Up Parallel Close Grip
exercises.notes: BW. As many clean reps as possible each set.

exercises.name: Machine Seated Row
exercises.notes: Dropped from 30 kg — forearm/back fatigue was collapsing reps. Hit full range first.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Up from 20 kg — 3x15 at RPE 8 last session.
